subcodes.first_line: O ye who are affiliated with the Threshold of Divine Oneness! Jinab-i-Aqa Muhammad Sadiq penned a brief letter, yet made therein an extensive plea [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منتسبان درگاه احدیت جناب آقا محمد صادق نامه مختصر نگاشت ولی رجای مفصل نمود
subcodes.subjects: @unity in diversity, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
